title: scutellaria rupestris subsp. caroli-henrici
intro: Scutellaria rupestris subsp. caroli-henrici is a subspecies of the alpine skullcap plant, a member of the mint family known for its distinctive shape and medicinal properties. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Scutellaria rupestris subsp. caroli-henrici include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
